specific_detail: Bajaj approved in 48 hours; we took 12 days for credit approval
could_have_won_if: Pre-approved pipeline for existing CA holders; 5-day TAT guarantee
reapproach_strategy: Approach with pre-approved offer when Bajaj loan due for renewal (12 months)

specific_detail: SBI offered 8.25% vs our 8.65%; customer purely rate-sensitive despite slower SBI process
could_have_won_if: Rate match authority for 40bps in premium segment; total cost pitch including insurance
reapproach_strategy: Wait for SBI service complaints (avg 60 days post-login); approach with balance transfer at parity rate

specific_detail: Paytm offered free Soundbox + QR + POS at zero cost; we wanted INR 500/month rental
could_have_won_if: Zero-cost POS for merchants with business loan or CASA relationship
reapproach_strategy: Re-approach with bundled offer: free POS if they take business loan for expansion

specific_detail: Axis had instant approval desk at showroom; customer didn't want to visit branch
could_have_won_if: Dealer partnership with approval desk at top dealerships; instant sanction letter
reapproach_strategy: Approach Hyundai/Maruti dealers for partnership; offer customer pre-approved at next service visit

specific_detail: SBI offered special fleet rate 8.75% for 10+ vehicles; our standard rate was 10.2%
could_have_won_if: Fleet pricing policy (10+ vehicles: base rate + 100bps); relationship pricing for total banking
reapproach_strategy: Approach when next fleet expansion happens; have fleet pricing pre-approved from RBH

specific_detail: Already had ICICI salary account + credit card; got instant pre-approved PL at 10.75%
could_have_won_if: CASA migration strategy for doctors program; pre-approved based on credit bureau pull
reapproach_strategy: Approach through doctor program channel; offer complete banking migration incentive

specific_detail: Farmer had no CIBIL; Mahindra approved on village-level assessment; we declined
could_have_won_if: Alternative credit scoring using UPI history + village assessment; surrogate income proof
reapproach_strategy: Develop farmer assessment program; re-approach with UPI-based underwriting pilot

specific_detail: Razorpay API was superior for developer team; our PG had integration issues
could_have_won_if: API modernization; developer sandbox; dedicated integration support team
reapproach_strategy: Re-approach when contract renewal comes up; demonstrate improved API + relationship banking value

specific_detail: Axis offered 1.5% rebate vs our 0.8%; procurement team focused purely on rebate percentage
could_have_won_if: Total value proposition tool showing spend analytics savings + T&E reduction + SAP integration ROI
reapproach_strategy: Re-approach at next annual review with data showing Axis analytics gaps; total value vs rebate analysis

specific_detail: Razorpay sandbox ready in 24 hours; our sandbox took 3 weeks; developer docs were outdated
could_have_won_if: Fast-track sandbox setup (48 hours); modernized developer documentation; dedicated integration engineer
reapproach_strategy: Re-approach when Razorpay raises pricing (usual at Series C); seller lending as differentiator

specific_detail: ICICI private banker had 8-year relationship; despite higher rate (9.5%) and lower LTV (50%)
could_have_won_if: Proactive HNI outreach before competitor lock-in; portfolio review offering + better LTV + combo pricing
reapproach_strategy: Approach when ICICI margin call triggers (quarterly); offer proactive rebalancing alerts + 2-day grace

specific_detail: SBI offered dedicated branch + 24/7 helpdesk for 8K employees; our service model couldn't match scale
could_have_won_if: Dedicated relationship team for 5K+ employee accounts; WhatsApp banking for scale; dedicated helpdesk SLA
reapproach_strategy: Re-approach when Hinduja's other subsidiaries come for renewal; start with smaller subsidiary as proof of concept

specific_detail: L&T Finance offered captive rate through L&T dealer network; plus same-day approval at dealer
could_have_won_if: Multi-brand equipment financing with dealer partnerships; milestone EMI for infra companies
reapproach_strategy: Re-approach for next NHAI project equipment needs; lead with milestone EMI + fleet fuel card bundling

specific_detail: Yes Bank sandbox ready in 2 weeks; offered 70:30 revenue share vs our 60:40; more flexible on co-branding
could_have_won_if: Competitive revenue share for fintechs above threshold; faster sandbox provisioning; dedicated fintech PM
reapproach_strategy: Re-approach when fintech scales beyond small bank limits; or when Yes Bank relationship concerns surface
